name: Countertop Calculator
seo_description: Calculate countertop area, backsplash area and estimated cost. Enter counter dimensions to get surface area in square metres and cost estimate instantly.
description: Free online countertop calculator. Enter counter length and counter depth to get instant results.
desc: Free online countertop calculator. Enter counter length and counter depth to get instant results.
steps: Identify what you want to calculate with the Countertop Calculator.
Enter the counter length in the input field.
Enter the counter depth in the input field.
Enter the backsplash height in the input field.
Fill in the remaining fields with your measurements.
Click Calculate to see your result instantly.
mistakes: Entering values in the wrong units — check that all measurements use the same unit system.
Forgetting to include a waste or safety margin — add 5-10% extra for real-world projects.
Using incorrect default values — verify the suggested defaults match your specific situation.
Rounding intermediate values too early — keep full precision until the final result.
formula_display: Surface area = Counter length Ã— depth; Backsplash = length Ã— backsplash_height; Cost = area Ã— price/mÂ²
result_context: Results: Surface area, Linear metres, Backsplash area.
